products.title: DentalDesk
products.tagline: AI Voice Receptionist + CRM for Cebu Dental Clinics
products.description: Provides Cebu dental clinics with an AI voice agent that eliminates missed calls, handles patient FAQs, and books appointments 24/7. Bundled with a personal CRM for clinic logistics, client tracking, and a portal website. End-to-end coverage of front-desk operations.
products.subject_line: Stop missing calls. Stop losing patients.
products.why_works: Voice + CRM + portal bundled for a specific market. Front-desk pain is universal across Cebu dental clinics.

products.title: Bureaucracy Buffer
products.tagline: Document Renewal Workflow for Recurring Permits
products.description: Recurring permits, vehicle registrations, and pro license renewals rely on remembering a date once a year. Bureaucracy Buffer is a Document Expiry workflow: an LLM parses renewal requirements (e.g., 'recent ID photo + clearance'), pre-fills known data into a checklist 30 days before deadline. Extensible to local government partnerships.
products.subject_line: Your driver's license expires in 30 days. Here's the checklist.
products.why_works: Recurring permits rely on remembering once a year — and people don't. Pre-filled checklists 30 days early prevent the scramble entirely.

products.title: Subscription Auditor
products.tagline: Cancel Vampire Subscriptions Before They Drain Your Account
products.description: Links bank/credit-card alerts (via email parser) to activity logs (Screen Time API, login history, last-used dates). If you haven't used a service in 45 days, the bot sends 'Cancel or Keep?' with a direct link to the cancellation page. Stops vampire bills before they drain your account.
products.subject_line: You haven't used Netflix in 47 days. Cancel?
products.why_works: If you haven't used a service in 45 days, you probably won't. We surface the bill and the cancel link in one tap.
